title: $ALLOW_NOBREAK_SPACE
text: $ALLOW_NOBREAK_SPACE Allow non-breaking spaces (0xA0) in ProcScript. $ALLOW_NOBREAK_SPACE { = } 1 | 0 Defaults Assignment file: client assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description When $ALLOW_NOBREAK_SPACE is set to 1, non-breaking spaces (0xA0) are allowed in ProcScript, otherwise they cause syntax errors.
